precondition: Fresh app start: PYTHONPATH=. SPARMVET_PERSONA=developer ./.venv/bin/python -m shiny run app/src/main.py
action: Open browser at http://localhost:8080; check browser console
expected_result: App loads. No red error messages in the browser console. (Warning 'Action sort is already registered' is known and acceptable.)

scenario: Default project loads and renders group tabs
action: Wait for home screen to stabilise (no spinner)
expected_result: Group nav tabs appear in the theater (e.g. 'Quality Control', 'Analysis'). At least one plot sub-tab is visible.

precondition: App loaded; ≥2 projects available in the selector
action: Change the project selector to a different project
expected_result: App shows a loading/recalculating indicator. After a moment, the group tabs update to reflect the new project's manifest.

scenario: Assembly message is clear when manifest changes
action: Change project selector; note what message appears during assembly
expected_result: Message says something like 'Assembling data…' or 'Loading…'. It does NOT say 'Source data has changed' when only the MANIFEST changed. [NOTE: Eve observed misleading 'source data changed' message in UI_user_test.md — check wording.]

scenario: Second project load is faster (cache hit)
precondition: App loaded; switch to project A and wait for full assembly; switch to project B; switch back to project A
action: Measure approximate time for the second load of project A
expected_result: Second load of project A is noticeably faster (parquet cache hit — no full re-assembly). [DataAssembler short-circuits when parquet hash matches.]

precondition: App loaded; a project assembled; then modify a source TSV file (add a row or change a value)
action: Switch away from the project and back (to trigger cache check)
expected_result: App detects that source data changed and reassembles. The new data appears in the plot/preview. [BUG-CACHE-1 fix: commit 09366fc. Confirm still works.]

precondition: App loaded; a project assembled; then edit the manifest YAML (change a wrangling step)
action: Switch away from the project and back
expected_result: App detects manifest change (manifest_sha256 changed) and reassembles. New output visible.

scenario: Assembly does NOT fire repeatedly on project switch
precondition: App loaded; switch between projects multiple times quickly
action: Watch the app console for assembly log lines
expected_result: Assembly fires once per unique project/data combination — not on every UI click. Second switch to same project + same data should be a fast path.

scenario: T1 data visible in data preview
precondition: Project loaded; T1 mode active (or T2); data preview accordion open
action: Look at the data preview table below the plot
expected_result: A data table is visible with rows and columns. Table reflects T1 (assembled) data.

scenario: T2 data differs from T1 when wrangling applied
precondition: Project loaded; a manifest with T2 wrangling steps (unpivot, join, etc.); switch between T1 and T2 using tier toggle
action: Compare data preview between T1 and T2 mode
expected_result: Data preview changes between T1 and T2 — visible difference in shape or content. [If no T2 wrangling in test manifest: mark SKIP and note which manifest to use.]

scenario: T3 applied filters change data preview
precondition: T3 mode; a filter applied via Apply button
expected_result: Rows matching the filter are removed from the data preview. Row count decreases.

scenario: Plots render without excessive delay on first load
precondition: Fresh project load; all plots visible
action: Observe time from tab click to plot appearing
expected_result: Plots appear within a few seconds on first load. Subsequent sub-tab switches are faster. [Eve noted slow plot rendering in UI_user_test.md — benchmark and record time.]

scenario: Tier toggle does not reset plot sub-tab
precondition: T2 mode; Plot A sub-tab active
expected_result: Active plot sub-tab stays on Plot A — does NOT jump to another plot. [Eve observed tab jumping in UI_user_test.md]

scenario: Tier toggle does not reset when it did not change data
precondition: T3 mode; tier toggle set; note active plot tab
action: Switch away to Blueprint Architect mode and switch back to Home
expected_result: Active tier toggle and active plot sub-tab are restored to what they were before the switch.
